About.title: About
About.description: A brief summary of who I am and my professional approach.
About.headline: Software Engineer specialized in creating high-impact digital solutions.
About.p1: Since I wrote my first line of code, I discovered that programming is a powerful tool to transform realities and optimize critical processes.
About.p2: With a solid focus on software architecture, I specialize in building scalable, robust, and user-centric applications. My expertise centers on developing digital products that not only work but meet the highest quality standards (Clean Code, SOLID, agile methodologies).
About.p3: My goal is to provide innovative technical solutions in high-performance teams, tackling complex challenges and elevating the quality of every project I participate in.
